partial_progress.details: Research complete with 383-line report covering deferral seed construction, consistency argument via DF, and symmetric predecessor existence via DB

key_findings: Succ relation from task 10 provides foundation (g_content + f_content conditions)
Deferral seed construction: g_content(u) ∪ {φ ∨ F(φ) | F(φ) ∈ u}
Consistency proof via DF axiom (F⊤ ∧ φ ∧ Hφ) → F(Hφ)
Lindenbaum extension gives MCS satisfying Succ conditions
Predecessor existence symmetric via DB (derivable from DF)
risks: Deferral seed consistency proof is non-trivial (similar discreteImmediateSuccSeed is axiomatized)
May need to adapt forward_temporal_witness_seed_consistent proof pattern
Fallback: axiomatize consistency if direct proof intractable
